name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, ginger, and cloves.
In another mixing bowl, combine pumpkin, skim milk, egg whites, raisins, and sour cream. Mix until just combined.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for 60 minutes.
